scripts.build:daily-puzzle-lambda: mkdir -p dist-lambda && pnpm exec esbuild terraform/lambda/daily-puzzle-fetcher.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=dist-lambda/daily-puzzle-fetcher.js
scripts.package:daily-puzzle-lambda: pnpm run build:daily-puzzle-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/daily-puzzle-fetcher.zip dist-lambda/daily-puzzle-fetcher.js
scripts.build:puzzle-statistics-lambda: mkdir -p dist-lambda && pnpm exec esbuild terraform/lambda/puzzle-statistics.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=dist-lambda/puzzle-statistics.js
scripts.package:puzzle-statistics-lambda: pnpm run build:puzzle-statistics-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/puzzle-statistics.zip dist-lambda/puzzle-statistics.js
scripts.build:user-dex-get-lambda: mkdir -p dist-lambda && pnpm exec esbuild terraform/lambda/user-dex-get.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist-lambda/user-dex-get.js
scripts.package:user-dex-get-lambda: pnpm run build:user-dex-get-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/user-dex-get.zip dist-lambda/user-dex-get.js
scripts.build:user-dex-patch-lambda: mkdir -p dist-lambda && pnpm exec esbuild terraform/lambda/user-dex-patch.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist-lambda/user-dex-patch.js
scripts.package:user-dex-patch-lambda: pnpm run build:user-dex-patch-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/user-dex-patch.zip dist-lambda/user-dex-patch.js
scripts.build:user-dex-shared-get-lambda: mkdir -p dist-lambda && pnpm exec esbuild terraform/lambda/user-dex-shared-get.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist-lambda/user-dex-shared-get.js
scripts.package:user-dex-shared-get-lambda: pnpm run build:user-dex-shared-get-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/user-dex-shared-get.zip dist-lambda/user-dex-shared-get.js
scripts.build:settings-get-lambda: mkdir -p dist-lambda && pnpm exec esbuild terraform/lambda/settings-get.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist-lambda/settings-get.js
scripts.package:settings-get-lambda: pnpm run build:settings-get-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/settings-get.zip dist-lambda/settings-get.js
scripts.build:settings-patch-lambda: mkdir -p dist-lambda && pnpm exec esbuild terraform/lambda/settings-patch.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist-lambda/settings-patch.js
scripts.package:settings-patch-lambda: pnpm run build:settings-patch-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/settings-patch.zip dist-lambda/settings-patch.js
scripts.package:admin-bonus-puzzle-post-lambda: pnpm run build:admin-bonus-puzzle-post-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/admin-bonus-puzzle-post.zip dist-lambda/admin-bonus-puzzle-post.js
scripts.build:cognito-user-metrics-lambda: mkdir -p dist-lambda && pnpm exec esbuild terraform/lambda/cognito-user-metrics.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist-lambda/cognito-user-metrics.js
scripts.package:cognito-user-metrics-lambda: pnpm run build:cognito-user-metrics-lambda && zip -j dist-lambda/cognito-user-metrics.zip dist-lambda/cognito-user-metrics.js
scripts.package:user-dex-lambdas: pnpm run package:user-dex-get-lambda && pnpm run package:user-dex-patch-lambda && pnpm run package:user-dex-shared-get-lambda
scripts.package:settings-lambdas: pnpm run package:settings-get-lambda && pnpm run package:settings-patch-lambda && pnpm run package:admin-bonus-puzzle-post-lambda
scripts.sync:pokedoku-details:local-data: pnpm fetch-pokemon && mkdir -p apps/pokedoku-details/src/generated && cp public/data/pokemon.json apps/pokedoku-details/src/generated/pokemon.local.json
